detail:
[source] Attention Is All You Need#5.4:-layer-normalization

summary:
Based on the source folder, the Transformer computes attention via scaled dot-product attention: it takes queries and keys of dimension d_k, computes their dot products, scales by 1/sqrt(d_k), and applies softmax to get weights over the values.
